title: scutellaria orbicularis
intro: Scutellaria orbicularis, also known as skullcap or Chinese skullcap, is a perennial plant in the mint family that is native to China, Korea, and parts of Russia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune system function. Skullcap can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
